name: Cottage Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cucumber, green onion, and radishes together in a bowl.
2. Add cottage cheese to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Stir in sour cream.
4. Stir in celery salt and black pepper.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and chill.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip
Suggested Dippers: Pita Bread Triangles, Potato Skins, Seafood, Turnips, Bok Choy
